code_structure.notes: Excellent component structure with clear separation of concerns

error_handling.notes: Comprehensive try-catch blocks with user-friendly error messages

type_safety.notes: Proper TypeScript types throughout, including exported interfaces

user_experience.notes: Loading states, confirmation dialogs, clear feedback, intuitive editing

performance.notes: Efficient state management, optimized re-renders, no unnecessary queries

overall_assessment.summary: Implementation is complete and exceeds all requirements. Goals are fully editable with persistence, weekly statistics are correctly calculated and visualized, all labels are in Italian, and the layout uses clean card-based design with green accents. Code quality is excellent with proper error handling, loading states, and TypeScript types.
